moments.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games Begin
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games kick off today in Glasgow, Scotland, bringing together over 3,000 athletes from 74 nations and territories for 11 days of sporting action.

angles.name: Opening Day Excitement
angles.copy: Let the Games begin! The Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games officially open today, with 11 days of incredible sport ahead. Who are you backing for gold? #Glasgow2026

angles.name: Scottish Spotlight
angles.copy: Glasgow takes centre stage! The Commonwealth Games are here, showcasing Scotland to the world. Get ready for an unforgettable 11 days of sport and national pride. #CommonwealthGames

moments.title: Bruno Mars Plays London This Weekend
moments.blurb: Bruno Mars continues his highly anticipated UK shows this weekend with performances in London on July 24th and 25th, his first UK dates in eight years.

angles.name: Live in London
angles.copy: 24K Magic in the air! ✨ Bruno Mars is lighting up London tonight and tomorrow. Who's got tickets to see the superstar? Let us know your favourite Bruno track!

angles.name: Weekend Vibes
angles.copy: London, get ready to dance! Bruno Mars brings his incredible show to the capital this weekend. Eight years in the making, these gigs are set to be legendary. #LiveMusic

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday tomorrow, July 24th.

angles.name: JLo's Big Day
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday tomorrow to the one and only Jennifer Lopez! From the block to global icon, she still runs the world. What's your favourite JLo anthem?

angles.name: Birthday Queen
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Tomorrow, July 24th, is Jennifer Lopez's 57th birthday. Still bringing the hits and the moves! 🎉

moments.title: Luke Combs Continues UK Tour
moments.blurb: Country music star Luke Combs continues his UK tour with dates running through to August 2nd.

angles.name: Country Calling
angles.copy: Luke Combs is bringing the house down across the UK this week! Who's caught him live or heading to a show before August 2nd? 🤠

angles.name: Road Trip for Country
angles.copy: If you're a country fan, Luke Combs is on tour in the UK until August 2nd! Don't miss your chance to see one of the biggest names in country music. #CountryMusic

moments.title: Race for Official Song of the Summer 2026
moments.blurb: The Official Charts Company has unveiled contenders for the Official Song of the Summer 2026, with Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' and ANOTR's 'Talk To You' among the top picks.

angles.name: Summer Anthem Debate
angles.copy: What's YOUR Official Song of the Summer 2026? The contenders are in, from Sam Fender & Olivia Dean to ANOTR. Who's got your vote?

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: Still buzzing from Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' hitting a record 16 weeks at Number 1. Could it be the ultimate Song of the Summer? The competition is fierce!

moments.title: World Cup Fever Hits UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: Following England's recent World Cup semi-final, classic football anthems 'Wonderwall' by Oasis and 'Three Lions' by Baddiel, Skinner and The Lightning Seeds have re-entered the UK Top 10.

angles.name: Football Anthems Return
angles.copy: Football's coming home (to the charts)! 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' are back in the Top 10 after the World Cup semi-final. Nothing beats a good singalong! ⚽🎶

angles.name: Classic Chart Comeback
angles.copy: Amazing to see Oasis and Baddiel, Skinner & The Lightning Seeds back in the Top 10! The power of the beautiful game to bring back the classics.

moments.title: AIG Women's Open at Royal Lytham & St Annes
moments.blurb: The AIG Women's Open golf championship takes place from July 29th to August 2nd at Royal Lytham & St Annes, bringing the world's top women golfers to Lancashire.

angles.name: Major Golf Tournament
angles.copy: Fore! 🏌️‍♀️ The AIG Women's Open tees off next week at Royal Lytham & St Annes. Who do you think will lift the trophy this year?

angles.name: Lancashire Hosts Golf
angles.copy: Get ready for world-class golf in Lancashire! The AIG Women's Open is coming to Royal Lytham & St Annes from July 29th. Don't miss the action! #Golf

moments.title: Mick Jagger Turns 83
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Mick Jagger turns 83 on Sunday! Still got the moves and the voice. What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger this Sunday! A true rock and roll legend. 🎸 #TheRollingStones

moments.title: Roger Taylor Celebrates 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Queen drummer Roger Taylor celebrates his 77th birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Drummer's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 77th Birthday to Queen's legendary drummer, Roger Taylor, this Sunday! What's your favourite Queen song featuring his powerful drumming?

angles.name: Queen's Beat
angles.copy: The rhythm of Queen! This Sunday, July 26th, we celebrate Roger Taylor's 77th birthday. An absolute icon behind the kit. 👑

moments.title: New Series of Ted Lasso Arrives August 5th
moments.blurb: A new series of the critically acclaimed comedy 'Ted Lasso' is set to premiere on Apple TV on Wednesday, August 5th.

angles.name: Football & Feel-Good TV
angles.copy: Get ready for more optimism and laughs! A new series of Ted Lasso lands on Apple TV on August 5th. Who's excited for the return of Richmond AFC's favourite coach?

angles.name: Must-Watch Comedy
angles.copy: Believe! The wait is almost over. Ted Lasso is back with a new series on Apple TV from August 5th. Time to rewatch the old seasons to prepare!

moments.title: Gary Numan Continues UK Tour
moments.blurb: Synth-rock pioneer Gary Numan is on tour across the UK, with upcoming dates including Halifax on July 31st and Palace Bowl on August 6th.

angles.name: Numan Live
angles.copy: The legendary Gary Numan is on tour across the UK! Catch him in Halifax on July 31st or Palace Bowl on August 6th. An icon of electronic music! 🤖

angles.name: Synth Pioneer
angles.copy: Still making groundbreaking music and performing live! Don't miss Gary Numan's UK tour dates this week and next. #LiveMusic

moments.title: Happy 63rd Birthday Fatboy Slim
moments.blurb: Norman Cook, better known as Fatboy Slim, the influential DJ and producer, celebrates his 63rd birthday on July 31st.

angles.name: Big Beat Birthday
angles.copy: Eat, Sleep, Rave, Repeat! Happy 63rd Birthday to the legendary Fatboy Slim this Friday, July 31st! What's your favourite track from the Brighton beatmeister?

angles.name: Dance Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to praise him like we should! Norman Cook, aka Fatboy Slim, turns 63 on Friday. Still bringing the party! 🎉 #NormanCook

moments.title: Cowes Week Sailing Regatta Begins
moments.blurb: The world-renowned Cowes Week sailing regatta starts on August 1st and runs until August 7th, bringing a week of competitive sailing and festivities to the Isle of Wight.

angles.name: Set Sail for Cowes
angles.copy: All aboard! ⛵ Cowes Week, one of the world's most famous sailing regattas, begins on August 1st. Get ready for a week of spectacular racing and seaside fun!

angles.name: Isle of Wight Event
angles.copy: The Isle of Wight is gearing up for Cowes Week, starting August 1st! A massive event for sailing enthusiasts and party-goers alike. Who's heading down?

moments.title: Joe Elliott of Def Leppard Turns 67
moments.blurb: Def Leppard frontman Joe Elliott celebrates his 67th birthday on August 1st.

angles.name: Rock Star Birthday
angles.copy: Pour Some Sugar On Me! Happy 67th Birthday to Def Leppard's legendary singer, Joe Elliott, this Saturday! 🎸 What's your go-to Def Leppard anthem?

angles.name: Def Leppard Frontman
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 67th birthday to Joe Elliott of Def Leppard on August 1st! Still rocking after all these years. #DefLeppard

moments.title: Weston-Super-Mare Sea Shanty & Folk Festival
moments.blurb: The Weston-Super-Mare Sea Shanty & Folk Festival brings maritime music and free performances to the Somerset coast from July 31st to August 2nd.

angles.name: Coastal Tunes
angles.copy: Ahoy there! ⚓ The Weston-Super-Mare Sea Shanty & Folk Festival sets sail this weekend, July 31st - August 2nd, with free music across the Somerset coast. Get ready for some toe-tapping tunes!

angles.name: Somerset Festival
angles.copy: Weston-Super-Mare is alive with music this weekend as the Sea Shanty & Folk Festival takes over! Enjoy free performances and a fantastic atmosphere. #WestonSuperMare

moments.title: Seaham Food Festival
moments.blurb: The free Seaham Food Festival takes place on August 1st and 2nd, offering a celebration of food and drink on the Durham coast.

angles.name: Foodie Fun in Seaham
angles.copy: Calling all foodies! 🍔 The Seaham Food Festival is on this weekend, August 1st & 2nd, bringing delicious treats to the Durham coast. Who's planning a visit?

angles.name: Durham Delights
angles.copy: Sunshine and delicious food! The Seaham Food Festival is happening this weekend. Come and explore the best of local produce and coastal vibes. #DurhamEvents

moments.title: BBC Proms Continue at Royal Albert Hall
moments.blurb: The world's largest classical music festival, the BBC Proms, continues at the Royal Albert Hall in London, running until September 12th.

angles.name: Classical Summer
angles.copy: Immerse yourself in classical music! The BBC Proms are in full swing at the Royal Albert Hall. A perfect summer evening out in London. 🎶

angles.name: London Culture
angles.copy: From July 17th to September 12th, the BBC Proms offer an incredible array of classical concerts at the iconic Royal Albert Hall. Don't miss out!
